themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Now there arose up a new king over Egypt, which knew not Joseph (וַיָּקָם מֶלֶךְ־חָדָשׁ עַל־מ...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Ephrem the Syrian on COMMENTARY ON TATIAN’S DIATESSARON 12: Just as Pharaoh was drowned in th...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיַּ֥עַשׂ: that he made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
